trims.trim: Note: 4-Series Gran Coupe not yet released

notes: BMW 3-Series (2006-2011 E90): Base 205/55R16, Sport has staggered options 225/40R18F/255/35R18R
BMW 3-Series (2012-2018 F30): Base 225/50R17, M Sport has staggered options 225/45R18F/255/40R18R or 225/40R19F/255/35R19R
BMW 4-Series (2014-2020 F32): Base 225/50R17, M Sport 225/45R18 or staggered 225/40R19F/255/35R19R
BMW 4-Series (2021-2026 G22): Base 225/45R18, M Sport has staggered options
BMW 4-Series Gran Coupe: Similar specs to 4-Series Coupe, same platform
BMW 5-Series (2024-2026 G60): Base 245/45R19, M Sport has staggered 20/21 inch options
